IDirect3DDevice8::DrawIndexedPrimitive

Renders the specified geometric primitives with the data specified by the vertex and index buffers.

HRESULT DrawIndexedPrimitive(
  D3DPRIMITIVETYPE Type,
  UINT MinIndex,
  UINT NumVertices,
  UINT StartIndex,
  UINT PrimitiveCount
);

Parameters

Type
[in] Member of the D3DPRIMITIVETYPE enumerated type, describing the type of primitive to render. PrimitiveType cannot be D3DPT_POLYGON. See Remarks.
MinIndex
[in] Ignored.
NumVertices
[in] Ignored.
StartIndex
[in] Location in the index array to start reading indices.
PrimitiveCount
[in] Number of primitives to render. The number of indices used is a function of the primitive count and the primitive type. The number of primitives must be less than 32 million.

Return Values

If the method succeeds, the return value is D3D_OK.

Remarks

DrawIndexedPrimitive uses IDirect3DDevice8::DrawIndexedVertices to render the indexed primitives from the current set of data input streams.

DrawIndexedPrimitive fails if no index array is set.

In order to use the D3DPT_POINTLIST for the PrimitiveType parameter of DrawIndexedVertices, D3DRS_POINTSPRITEENABLE must be set to TRUE using SetRenderState.

Requirements

  Header: Declared in D3d8.h.
  Import Library: Use D3d8.lib.

See Also

IDirect3DDevice8::DrawIndexedVertices, IDirect3DDevice8::DrawPrimitive, IDirect3DDevice8::SetStreamSource
